rationale: Spec requires invalid readPreference URI values to raise an error; driver silently sets mode:nil with no warning.
Max-staleness spec explicitly requires -1 as valid value; driver warns and rejects it, contradicting the spec.
Connection-string spec requires percent-decoding once; driver double-decodes replica set, auth source, and read preference tag options.
Internal refactoring to reduce code duplication in URI options parsing; no behavior change.
URI ergonomics improvement allowing query string to start with &; not a spec requirement.
Internal threading improvement to always wait for background threads on close; no spec rule violated.
CI test failure in mocked unit test not accounting for lsid being added to operations; test maintenance issue.
SDAM/CMAP spec requires pool clearing when server transitions to unknown; driver did not clear on monitor ismaster timeout.
Driver uses regex filter in listCollections incompatible with Atlas free tier; Atlas-specific compatibility issue, not spec violation.
Auth error classes not deriving from Mongo::Error; internal error hierarchy design, no specific spec rule violated.
Improving CMAP event diagnostics and exception labeling for troubleshooting; observability improvement, not spec behavior.
Updating bulk write and retryable write YAML spec test format to new request/arguments structure; child of DRIVERS-480.
SDAM spec requires network errors to trigger error handling; Timeout::Error bypasses SDAM processing entirely.
Dropping Ruby 1.9 support; language version change unrelated to spec compliance.
Test cleanup performance issue: endSessions called per-session instead of batched; test efficiency, not spec compliance.
Cluster finalizer ordering bug causing post-close connections; internal GC/lifecycle implementation bug.
Internal refactoring to consolidate response handling code; no behavior change.
Internal unification of last_scan and last_update_time tracking; implementation refactoring in SDAM area, no specific spec rule violated.
Auth spec requires raising error on invalid mechanism at construction; driver defers to first operation instead.
Adding server address and retry attempt info to exception messages; diagnostic/ergonomics improvement, not spec behavior.
Nil average_round_trip_time causes unhandled exception in server selection; nil-handling implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Implementing auth spec test runner; child of DRIVERS-472 coordinating auth spec test rollout across drivers.
Retryable reads spec defines specific eligible operations; arbitrary database#command should not be retried.
Removing the wait positional argument from close/disconnect methods; API cleanup with no spec behavior change.
Updating CRUD spec test runner to use new runOn syntax; child of DRIVERS-679 coordinating test format update.
Updating CRUD spec test runner to use new runOn syntax; child of DRIVERS-679 coordinating test format update.
SPEC-1350/1453 changed spec to omit default fullDocument; driver was still sending fullDocument:default.
Spec change requires omitting bypassDocumentValidation when false; driver was sending it unconditionally.
Updating CMAP spec test assertions to include address field per SPEC-1365; test runner update.
Resyncing bson-corpus array.json to fix duplicate test names; child of DRIVERS-732.
Background monitor thread cannot restart after disconnect; internal threading lifecycle bug.
Prohibiting distinct(nil) to adapt to server 4.4 behavior; validation improvement not contradicting a specific spec rule.
Updating sharded transaction spec tests to avoid snapshot readConcern; child of DRIVERS-735.
Missing exception class name in ismaster failure log message; logging diagnostic improvement.
Connection string spec test runner bug: host assertions not properly verified due to rspec block placement error.
Documentation rewrite for user management; no driver behavior change.
Auth spec requires $external auth source as string; driver sends Ruby symbol :external causing X.509 auth failure.
Forwarding server error message in auth failure exceptions; diagnostic improvement, not spec behavior.
Adding integration test verifying retry exception references second attempt server; internal test addition, not YAML spec test.
Adding connection IDs to command logger output; observability improvement, not spec behavior.
Authentication option inconsistency between URI and Ruby client options; thin description, unclear specific spec rule violated.
Improving error messages for invalid UTF-8 in BSON; error message quality improvement, no spec rule violated.
Adding repository URL to gemspec for third-party tools; packaging metadata change.
Dropping Ruby 1.9/JRuby 9.1 support in bson-ruby; language version change.
Adding X.509 integration tests and Evergreen CI configuration; non-YAML integration test addition.
Fixing inconsistent TLS option usage in spec README; documentation fix.
BSON spec defines cstrings as null-terminated; put_cstring silently truncates symbols at null bytes instead of raising error.
Adding RB_GC_GUARD to prevent GC-related memory safety issues in C extension; internal GC safety fix.
Reorganizing bson-ruby C extension into separate files; internal code organization refactoring.
Fixing ByteBuffer edge cases (put_byte truncation, replace_int32 bounds); internal buffer implementation bugs.
